subcodes.first_line: O native of the kingdom! Thy letter arrived, and its contents manifested that, thank God, thou art enlightened by the light of God's love
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ملکوتی نامه تو رسید و از مضامین معلوم گردید که الحمد لله بنور محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
